title: Medication error — wrong dose administered in Dillon Med/Surg
description: Patient received double the prescribed dose of metoprolol due to incomplete medication reconciliation at admission. Error caught during nursing reassessment at shift change. No adverse outcome; patient monitored and stabilized.

title: CLABSI identified in Medical ICU — Patient R.M.
description: Central line-associated bloodstream infection confirmed via blood culture in Medical ICU patient with femoral CVC in place for 9 days. Root cause analysis initiated; preliminary review suggests lapses in daily line necessity review and hand hygiene noncompliance during dressing changes.

title: Patient complaint — delayed post-surgical reassessment
description: Patient family filed formal complaint stating that no nurse performed a reassessment for over 5 hours following knee replacement surgery at Darlington. Chart review confirmed a 5.5-hour gap between documented assessments, exceeding the 4-hour policy maximum.

title: Near-miss — unprivileged physician attempted to perform procedure
description: A locum tenens physician scheduled an interventional procedure without having the specific privilege on file. The pre-procedure verification checklist caught the discrepancy and the procedure was reassigned. Investigation revealed the physician's temporary privilege file was one of the three identified in FND-001 with incomplete documentation.

title: Sanitizer dispenser outage during norovirus precautions — Dillon ED
description: During an active norovirus precaution period in Dillon ED, two of three wall-mounted hand sanitizer dispensers in the triage area were found empty for an estimated 6-hour window. Correlates with FND-006 audit findings on dispenser availability.

title: QAPI committee failed to convene in October
description: The October QAPI committee meeting was cancelled due to scheduling conflicts and was not rescheduled within the same month. This compounds FND-003 observations about lack of action item follow-through, as the September meeting's open items received no documented review.

title: Patient fall with injury — post-surgical unit Darlington
description: Post-surgical patient fell while attempting to ambulate unassisted to bathroom. Patient sustained minor laceration. Chart review showed the most recent reassessment was 4 hours and 20 minutes prior to the fall, and the fall risk score had not been updated post-operatively. Relates to the reassessment documentation gaps identified in FND-005.
